module_summaries.summary:
Line 1: Users can enter credentials to sign in or use the Forgot Password link to start recovery.
Line 2: Shows email/username and password fields, validation errors, and authentication success/failure flash messages.

Line 1: Users can complete and submit a registration form to create a new account.
Line 2: Shows all personal and credential fields (name, address, SSN, phone, username/email, password), inline validation hints, and registration success/failure messages.

Line 1: Users can view their accounts dashboard and inspect account rows (account number is clickable but not functional yet).
Line 2: Shows welcome message, a table of accounts with masked account numbers, account type, current balance, account status badge, open date, and total balance footer.

Line 1: Users can select Checking or Savings, choose a funding source, enter an initial deposit, and submit to open a new account.
Line 2: Shows account type cards with features and minimums, funding account dropdown and balances, deposit field, real-time validation errors, and open-account success/failure messages.

Line 1: Users can initiate internal or external transfers by selecting transfer type, source account, destination, and amount, then submit the transfer.
Line 2: Shows transfer type options, source and destination account fields, transfer amount, validation errors (insufficient funds, account mismatch), and transfer confirmation messages.

Line 1: Users can enter payee details, select a source account, specify an amount, and submit to make a bill payment.
Line 2: Shows payee name and address fields, account and payment amount fields, validation errors, payment success with reference code, and updated balances.

Line 1: Users can choose a loan type (Personal, Auto, Home), enter loan amount, down payment, select collateral, and submit a loan request.
Line 2: Shows loan type cards with interest rates, allowed amount ranges, down payment and collateral fields, validation feedback, and approval/rejection result messages.

Line 1: Users can edit and submit their contact profile fields (name, address, phone) and update their profile.
Line 2: Shows pre-filled contact fields, inline validation errors, and success or error banners after submission.

Line 1: Users can request a new debit/credit card and manage existing card controls (spending limit, travel notices, freeze/unfreeze).
Line 2: Shows card request inputs and shipping address, existing cards dropdown with status, control fields, validation errors, and success messages with tracking IDs.

Line 1: Users can view a portfolio snapshot and place buy or sell orders for funds by specifying symbol, quantity, and funding/destination account.
Line 2: Shows read-only holdings, market value, unrealized gain/loss, trade form fields, validation errors, and trade execution confirmations.

Line 1: Users can generate account statements for a selected period and toggle e-statement (paperless) preference.
Line 2: Shows statement period selectors, account dropdown, retrieved transactions for the period, generation success/failure messages, and e-statement email preference fields.

Line 1: Users can change their password by providing the current password and a new strong password and submitting the form.
Line 2: Shows current/new/confirm password fields, validation errors for strength/match, and a success message when the password is changed.

Line 1: Users can send secure messages to support or schedule a callback by providing subject, category or reason, and preferred times.
Line 2: Shows message and callback forms, validation guidance, attachment options, and success responses with ticket IDs or scheduled callback confirmations.

test_cases.title: Sign in successfully using a registered email

test_cases.preconditions: User has a registered account
